issues.title: Add transaction search functionality
issues.description: Add a search input to the TransactionTable component that allows filtering transactions by hash, source address, or destination address.
hints: Add a search state to the component
Filter transactions based on search input
Consider debouncing the search for performance

issues.title: Create asset detail modal
issues.description: Add a clickable asset row that opens a detailed view showing full issuer address, all trustlines, and transaction history for that asset.
hints: Use the existing Dialog component from shadcn/ui
Display the full issuer public key with copy functionality
Show a mini transaction history

issues.title: Improve keyboard accessibility
issues.description: Add proper ARIA labels, roles, and keyboard navigation throughout the dashboard. Focus should be manageable with Tab key.
hints: Add aria-label to icon buttons
Ensure all interactive elements are focusable
Add sr-only text where needed

issues.title: Add CSV export for transactions
issues.description: Add a button to export the current transaction list to CSV format for offline analysis.
hints: Create a utility function to convert transactions to CSV
Use Blob and URL.createObjectURL for download
Include all relevant transaction fields

issues.title: Add loading skeletons
issues.description: Replace the basic loading states with skeleton loaders that match the layout of the actual content.
hints: Use the Skeleton component from shadcn/ui
Match the dimensions of the actual content
Add subtle animation

issues.title: Add risk level filter to transactions
issues.description: Add filter buttons or a dropdown to filter the transaction table by risk level (low, medium, high, critical).
hints: Add filter state to CommandCenter
Pass filter to TransactionTable
Consider using badge-style buttons for visual feedback

issues.title: Add sound notifications for critical alerts
issues.description: Play a subtle notification sound when a critical alert is received. Include a setting to enable/disable.
hints: Use the Web Audio API or an audio element
Store the preference in localStorage
Only play for critical severity alerts

issues.title: Add time range filter for stats
issues.description: Allow users to view stats for different time ranges (1h, 24h, 7d, 30d) instead of just 24h.
hints: Add a time range selector component
Update the API to accept a timeRange parameter
Update the hook to pass the parameter

issues.title: Implement real Stellar SDK integration
issues.description: Replace mock data with real Stellar testnet data using the stellar-sdk package for account balance and transaction history.
hints: Use stellar-sdk Server class to connect to Horizon
Start with testnet: https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org
Handle rate limiting appropriately

issues.title: Add transaction detail expansion
issues.description: Make transaction rows expandable to show full details including memo, ledger, fee, and full addresses.
hints: Use a collapsible row pattern
Show full addresses without truncation
Include copy buttons for addresses
